title: Mexico Rating Outlook Revised to Negative at S&P as Debts Mount
summary: S&P Global Ratings revised Mexico’s credit outlook to negative from stable, citing persistently weak fiscal results, rising debt levels and weak economic growth.

title: Activist Ananym Urges BWX to Make Commercial Nuclear Reactors
summary: Activist fund Ananym Capital Management is pushing nuclear technology company BWX Technologies Inc. to tap its nuclear reactor manufacturing capabilities for commercial use.

title: Trump's Goal In China? Keep It Simple
summary: Expectations are running high for the US-China summit in Beijing, but Trump’s main goal should be to not make things worse, the Editorial Board writes. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Japan’s Sojitz Eyes Southeast Asia for New Rare Earths Supply
summary: Japanese trading house Sojitz Corp. is looking to Southeast Asia and other regions as new potential sources of rare earths outside Australia, as it aims to boost output and diversify its supply chain of the highly sought-after materials.

Brazil Meat Left Out of EU Suppliers List in Risk to Trade
summary: Brazil is absent from a list of countries authorized to supply animal products to the European Union, presenting a trade risk to the world’s largest beef and chicken exporter.
